hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple compliance provider dashboards into one structured workflow to reduce manual handoffs and strengthen audit-ready evidence and regulatory rule alignment.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Compliance slows when providers stay disconnected
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams face delays and duplicated effort because KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers operate in separate dashboards. This fragmentation weakens audit trails, obscures risk context and complicates coordinated case management across multiple systems.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening provider data into one structured compliance workflow, enabling operational teams to manage cases, decisions and audit evidence with full risk context and traceability.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes multiple provider dashboards by routing checks through rules, reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation for consistent compliance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect multiple provider dashboards?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects outputs from multiple compliance providers into one structured workflow, reducing fragmentation and enabling consistent reviews, decision logs, cases, evidence, rule updates, and reporting in a connected compliance environment.
faq_2_question: How are compliance cases created from providers?
faq_2_answer: Provider outputs trigger alerts and checks that SFTY organizes into assigned cases, routing them for review with linked evidence, decision logs and escalation workflows tailored for VASP compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete case histories, decision records and supporting evidence, supporting audit-ready traceability for compliance reviews, internal control and regulatory inspection readiness across multiple providers.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can integrate with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools as a compliance control layer without replacing provider systems or disrupting current workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into workflows without replacing the underlying compliance or analytics tools.
final_title: Connect provider dashboards into one compliance workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes multi-provider outputs into structured cases, decision logs, evidence and regulatory rule alignment.
